name: Documenting Wage Loss

mainEntity.name: Prove lost wages from ladder fall in Midvale?
mainEntity.text: Prove lost wages from ladder fall in Midvale?

acceptedAnswer.text: Submit pay stubs, tax returns, W-2s; overtime history via logs. AWW avg high/low quarters.

suggestedAnswer.text: Midvale tradesmen: Include bonuses/shifts. Expert economist for future losses. Insurers audit—keep perfect records.

description: Submit pay stubs, tax returns, W-2s; overtime history via logs. AWW avg high/low quarters.
